channel.title: Create Ubuntu VMs :: SE How-To Build Lab
channel.description: If you get the error No route to host with any of the following steps, use the Troubleshoot Ansible steps ​ RDP to OOB from Terminal in OOB cd /home/fortinet/automation/ansible/ubuntu ./create_ubuntu_vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> ubuntu_sdwan ./start_stop_remove_vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> ubuntu_sdwan started ​ Continuing from Terminal in OOB Make sure Ubuntu-x VMs have fully started (i.e. GUI is up and running) before exeucting the following. Suggest opening console windows on PVE to verify. ./wallpaper_update.sh ubuntu_sdwan
